Get in Touch

Start Your Child's
Technology Journey

At Branky STEM Labs, we're always excited to connect with families passionate about technology, creativity and future skills. Whether you have questions, want to explore our programs or experience our smart labs firsthand, our team is here to guide you.

Book Your Child's Free Demo Session

Experience hands-on learning in AI, Robotics, Coding & Future Technologies at Branky STEM Labs.

Your information is safe. We never share your data.

Vadodara's full-fledged AI, Robotics & Coding centre for ages 4–14, built around hands-on learning, smart labs and real technology exposure.

Programs

  • Advanced Robotics & IoT (11–14)
